question: What specific repair and maintenance tasks are included in a restoration?
answer: Our full restoration includes: high-pressure roof cleaning, replacement of all broken/cracked tiles, rebedding and repointing of all ridge caps, resealing of flashings and valleys, application of primer, two-coat paint system, gutter cleaning, and a final site clean-up. We also provide a written report with before/after photos so you can see exactly what was done.
